articles.title: World Chain Taps Circle USDC for 25M Users—Is $2 Trillion Stablecoin Boom Next?
articles.description: World Chain has folded USDC and Circle’s Cross-Chain Transfer Protocol into its network, permitting holders to swap bridged balances for reserve-backed tokens, send funds across chains without centralized exchanges or third-party bridges, and access new business rails for seamless fiat conversion.

articles.title: Ripple re-locks 700 million XRP in May, calming market fears
articles.description: Summary:⚈ Ripple re-locked 700 million XRP on May 1, easing sell-off concerns.⚈ No new XRP is entering circulation for May, helping stabilize the price.⚈ XRP lags behind Bitcoin, rising only 4.25% in the past 30 days

articles.title: Smart money quietly buys 900 million XRP
articles.description: Summary⚈ XRP whales bought around 900 million tokens in April, signaling possible bullish sentiment.⚈ The SEC delayed its XRP ETF decision, and short positions recently surged.⚈ Despite bullish buys, whale activity slowed, and a $68.7M transfer hints at selling

articles.title: Ether more ‘like a memecoin,’ says trading firm as ETH drops 45% YTD
articles.description: As Ether’s price has struggled in the first quarter of 2025, a US-based investment adviser firm, Two Prime, has dropped support for ETH and adopted a Bitcoin-only strategy. After lending $1. 5 billion in loans both in Bitcoin (BTC) and Ether (ETH) over the past 15 months, Two Prime decided to ditch ETH to focus solely on BTC asset management and lending, the firm announced on May 1. “ETH’s statistical trading behavior, value proposition, and community culture have failed beyond a point that is w

articles.title: Two Prime Ditches Ethereum for Bitcoin, Citing ‘Meme Coin’ Behavior
articles.description: The algorithmic trading firm announced that it is dropping all exposure to Ethereum, calling it “statistically broken. ”

articles.title: Vitalik Buterin charts Ethereum’s 2025 roadmap ahead of Pectra upgrade on 7 May
articles.description: 2-5-2025 – Ethereum co-architect Vitalik Buterin has outlined his strategic vision for 2025, placing Layer 1 (L1) protocol enhancement at the forefront of his agenda. The forthcoming Pectra upgrade, slated for 7 May on the Mainnet, represents a crucial milestone in Ethereum’s development trajectory.
